canonical_source.title: Nomenclature of Organic Chemistry: IUPAC Recommendations and Preferred Names 2013, Blue Book Version 3
notes: The PDF is the canonical source for Blue Book Version 3 provenance.
The PDF itself is intentionally not committed to this repository.

extraction_sources.title: IUPAC Blue Book HTML version
notes: Used for section-addressable extraction of rule text and rule identifiers.
Records derived from this source should be treated as aligned with the canonical PDF unless contradicted by explicit corrections.

extraction_sources.title: IUPAC Blue Book post-Version-3 corrections
notes: Used to preserve post-Version-3 correction provenance and target-rule links.
Correction records are represented separately from the canonical Version 3 rule corpus.
